action.reasoning: Observation: 8 iterations done, no eval submitted yet. The pretrained mit-b5 model at checkpoints/pretrained/ is already fine-tuned on ADE20K and should give a decent baseline (~47-50% mIoU). Previous training was extremely slow (~4.5h/epoch). Analysis: Need to get a baseline score immediately, then optimize training. The pretrained model can be evaluated right now. Decision: Submit eval with pretrained checkpoint to get baseline score and measure eval time. Also rewrite training script to be much faster (larger batch size, DDP, better data loading).
action.command: python -c "from transformers import SegformerForSemanticSegmentation; m = SegformerForSemanticSegmentation.from_pretrained('checkpoints/pretrained'); print('Model loaded OK, num_labels:', m.config.num_labels); m.save_pretrained('checkpoints/pretrained')"
